title: Orphan claude-process audit + reaper
description: New AuditKind: orphan_process. Finds claude/codex/kimi processes whose tty has no live login session. Real incident 2026-05-18: pids 36240/84125/54521/86041/86047 alive on closed ttys. Dashboard one-click [kill] (confirmation gated). CLI: sweech audit orphans [--kill --yes]. tcgetpgrp foreground-group check to never kill active sessions.
